subject: oop
title: Animal Sounds
description:
Implement base class Animal with method speak(). Create Dog/Cat override speak(). Print sounds based on input.

Input: a list of animal types.
Output: corresponding sounds.

subject: oop
title: Bank Account
description: Design class BankAccount with balance, deposit, withdraw. Read commands and print balance after each command.

subject: nmlt
title: Two Sum (Sorted)
description: Given sorted array, find two numbers whose sum equals S. Output indices (1-based) or -1.
